analysis.reasoning: Core message: China will host COP15 in Kunming and is ready to work with all parties to ensure positive outcomes. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes; emphasizes China's cooperative role, multilateral engagement, and readiness to work with all parties for a global public good (biodiversity). CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not addressed; focus is international cooperation, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): Not explicitly; hosting an event isn’t framed as a domestic governance achievement or technological/economic leadership. CH6 (interesting culture/nature): While Kunming/Yunnan are mentioned, the tweet isn’t promoting culture or nature; it's informational about hosting COP15. Conclusion: Only CH2 applies.
